error.title: Something went wrong
error.body: We couldn't sign you in. Please try again.

unreachable.title: Server unreachable
unreachable.body: The server isn't responding. Check your connection and retry — everything should come back on its own.

denied.title: Authorization failed
denied.body: The Telegram handshake was refused. Try again; if it keeps happening, reopen the app from the bot.

today.title: Today

summary.tip: Your review load — cards due right now, in the next 24 hours, and total active.

streak.tip: Your current streak — consecutive days with at least one review.

yesterday.title: Yesterday
yesterday.tip: How yesterday went — cards reviewed, hit-rate and how many slipped.

heatmap.title: Schedule
heatmap.tip: Your review activity over the last 90 days. Hover a cell to see the exact count for that day.

stats.totalTip: Total reviews you've done across the last 90 days.
stats.activeTip: Days out of {{total}} with at least one review. A regularity signal.
stats.bestTip: Your most productive day and how many reviews you did on it.

heatmap.aria: Review activity over the last {{days}} days — {{total}} reviews in total

recent.title: Recently reviewed
recent.tip: Cards you've touched recently. Tap any row to reopen.

dueList.tip: Cards ready for review right now, soonest first. Tap any row to open the card. Swipe right to mark easy, swipe left to mark hard — swipe further left to say you forgot.

today.reviewError_one: Couldn't save one review — try swiping it again.
today.reviewError_other: Couldn't save {{count}} reviews — try swiping them again.

empty.title: All caught up for today
empty.hint: Come back later — the next wave of cards is on schedule.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Your review load, 90-day activity, and what's coming.

empty.title: No history yet
empty.body: Once you review your first card, this screen fills up with your rhythm and what's ahead.

empty.title: Nothing to review
empty.body: You're all caught up for today — the next wave lands on schedule.

rough.title: Tricky set
rough.body_one: {{count}} card down in {{seconds}}s. Come back for another round.
rough.body_other: {{count}} cards down in {{seconds}}s. Come back for another round.

error.grade: Couldn't save the grade — try again

errors.title: Miss log
errors.subtitle: Where you fell down — noticed on purpose.

orb.tip: Retrieval misses over the last 7 days. The point isn't the count — it's noticing the shape of them.

empty.title: No misses this week
empty.body: That's ETR working. Log the next one and the pattern will surface on its own.

sheet.title: What went wrong?
sheet.placeholder: One line is enough. Name the concept you slipped on and how — the shape matters more than the wording.

error.save: Couldn't save the miss — try again
